text: Wall Street stocks surged today after the Federal Reserve announced a rate cut.
NASA launched a new Mars rover equipped with AI-powered navigation systems.
Manchester United signed a new striker in a record-breaking transfer deal.
The United Nations held an emergency session to address the humanitarian crisis.
Apple released its latest iPhone with an improved camera and longer battery life.
The Olympic Games committee announced the host city for 2036.
Oil prices dropped sharply amid concerns over a global economic slowdown.
Researchers at MIT developed a new algorithm that speeds up drug discovery.
The president met with foreign leaders to discuss a new trade agreement.
The Lakers defeated the Celtics in a thrilling overtime game last night.
